# dokku_postgres (Resource)

Manages a Dokku postgres service (`dokku postgres:create`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Service name.

### Optional

- `image_version` (String) Datastore image version/tag, e.g. "16". Changing this upgrades the service in place.

### Read-Only

- `dsn` (String, Sensitive) Connection string for the service.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Current container status of the service.
